steps.text: Go to console.cloud.google.com and open or create a project.
Search for 'Gmail API' and click Enable.
Click Create Credentials → OAuth client ID.
Set Application type to Desktop app.
Under Authorized redirect URIs add: http://localhost:8080/api/auth/callback
Click Create, then Download JSON — this is your client_secret.json.
Add your email address as a test user.

notes.text: The redirect URI must be exactly: http://localhost:8080/api/auth/callback (or your deployed base URL + /api/auth/callback).
Only gmail.readonly is required. Expensor never modifies your inbox.
